backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Resolt backend, handling user profiles with subscription tiers, product listings organized by category, and access control via authorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades old actor state by adding subscriptionTier to user profiles, isAuction and sellerTier to products, and converting the productIdCounter from a list to a Nat.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (pricing plans page, subscription badges, feature locks, hot auction labels) to their corresponding source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document providing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes, including colors for background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with the page title set to 'Resolt' and a root div that mounts the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for BrowsePage (/), AddProductPage (/add-product), and PlansPage (/plans), all wrapped in a shared Layout with ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Full-screen modal component for capturing product photos using the useCamera hook, with support for camera switching, error states (permission denied, not found, not supported), and loading indicators.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Renders a row of filter buttons for product categories, fetching categories via a query hook and highlighting the currently selected one.
frontend/src/components/FeatureLock.tsx: Wraps children and shows a locked overlay with an upgrade prompt if the user's subscription tier is below the required level, redirecting to the plans page on click.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice with the current year.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Page layout wrapper that composes Navigation, a main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, Plans link, subscription badge, Sell Item button, and login/logout handling via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a single product's image, title, category badge, description, and price, with a 'Hot Auction' badge for pro/max seller auctions.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Form for listing a new product with title, description, price, category, and optional camera-captured photo, converting the image to base64 before submission.
frontend/src/components/ProductGrid.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of ProductCard components from a given array of products.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and creates a starter-tier profile via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/SubscriptionBadg: Renders a small colored badge for Pro or Max subscription tiers; returns null for the starter tier.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, AuthClient creation, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including categories, products, user profiles, and subscription tier upgrades.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddProductPage.tsx: Page for listing a new product, rendering a ProductForm and gated seller tools (analytics, bulk upload, AI pricing, custom shop) locked behind Pro/Max subscription tiers.
frontend/src/pages/BrowsePage.tsx: Browse page that displays all or category-filtered products in a grid, with an advanced filters section gated behind the Pro subscription tier.
frontend/src/pages/PlansPage.tsx: Subscription plans page showing Starter, Pro, and Max tier feature lists with upgrade buttons that call the backend mutation and display the user's current plan.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom fonts (Inter, Cal Sans), an oklch-based color system with semantic tokens, and subscription tier colors for Starter, Pro, and Max plans.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the app's architecture, existing implemented features, and pending feature requests for a marketplace with three subscription tiers (Starter, Pro, Max).
